Features

Your Blockchain Adventure

Epic Quests

Complete challenging quests to earn exclusive rewards and level up your gaming profile. Join epic adventures!

Staking Rewards

Stake your tokens to earn passive rewards and unlock exclusive platform benefits. Maximize your earnings!

Token Swap

Seamlessly swap tokens across multiple chains with our integrated DEX aggregator. Best rates guaranteed!

Multi-Chain Support

Your Gateway to Multiple Blockchains

Experience seamless integration across major blockchain networks. Our platform supports multiple chains, allowing you to interact with your favorite networks effortlessly.

Ethereum

The foundation of DeFi and Web3, offering smart contract capabilities and widespread adoption.

Solana

High-performance blockchain with lightning-fast transactions and minimal fees.

Binance Smart Chain

Popular chain combining high throughput with low transaction costs.

Avalanche

Highly scalable platform for launching decentralized applications and enterprise blockchain deployments.

Arbitrum

Layer 2 scaling solution offering lower fees while maintaining Ethereum's security.

Polygon

Ethereum's leading scaling platform, enabling fast and cost-effective transactions.

Tokenomics

Tokenomics

Strategic token distribution designed for sustainable ecosystem growth

Max Supply

251,000,000 VLT

The total supply of VLT tokens that will ever exist.

100%

Platform Ecosystem

62,750,000 VLT

Allocated for platform development, marketing, and ecosystem growth.

25%

Liquidity

75,300,000 VLT

Reserved for providing liquidity across multiple chains.

30%

Community & Airdrops

87,850,000 VLT

Distributed to the community through airdrops and rewards.

35%

Team & Founders

25,100,000 VLT

Reserved for the team and project founders.

10%

Deflationary Mechanism

  • •0.1% of all transactions are automatically burned
  • •Additional burning through platform achievements
  • •Quarterly manual burns based on platform revenue

Token Utility

  • •Access to exclusive game modes and tournaments
  • •Stake to earn passive rewards and boost earnings
  • •Governance voting rights for platform decisions
Development Roadmap

Our Journey Ahead

Track our progress as we build the future of Web3. Each phase brings new features and opportunities.

Phase 1Completed

Platform Launch

Establishing the foundation of Vilotra Web3 platform with essential features and multi-chain support.

  • ◆Multi-chain wallet integration (Ethereum, Solana, BSC, Avalanche, Arbitrum, Polygon)
  • ◆Secure authentication system with wallet connect
  • ◆Basic quest system implementation
  • ◆Token reward distribution mechanism
  • ◆Enhanced quest mechanics with daily/weekly challenges
Phase 2In Progress

Platform Expansion & Financial Integration

Expanding platform capabilities with advanced financial features and enhanced user engagement systems.

  • ◆Implement Boost Zone system
  • ◆Advanced Solana staking protocol implementation
  • ◇Deposit and withdrawal system will be available
  • ◇Strategic VLT token listings on major exchanges
  • ◇Launch of Vilotra DEX - our native decentralized exchange
Phase 3

Advanced Gaming Features

Introducing competitive gaming elements and advanced reward mechanisms.

  • ◇PvP battle system with matchmaking
  • ◇Guild system with governance
  • ◇Tournament platform with prize pools
  • ◇Advanced reward mechanisms with staking
  • ◇Cross-game asset compatibility
  • ◇Seasonal gaming events and rankings
Phase 4

Mobile & Cross-platform

Expanding platform accessibility and enhancing user experience across devices.

  • ◇Mobile app development (iOS & Android)
  • ◇Cross-platform progression sync
  • ◇Mobile-optimized UI/UX
  • ◇Push notifications for events
  • ◇Mobile wallet integration
  • ◇Offline mode capabilities
FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about the Vilotra platform

Connecting to the Vilotra platform is simple:
1) Click the 'Connect Wallet' button in the top right corner
2) Select your preferred wallet (Phaton, Solflare, MetaMask, Trust Wallet, or any Web3 wallet)
3) Approve the connection request in your wallet
We support multiple chains including Ethereum, Solana, and other major networks for your convenience.
There are multiple ways to earn VLT tokens:
1) Complete daily and weekly quests on the platform
2) Participate in staking programs to earn passive rewards
3) Engage in community events and tournaments
4) Refer new users through our referral program
5) Trade and provide liquidity in our supported DEXs ( Coming soon )
Each activity is designed to reward active participation in our ecosystem.
Multi-Chain refers to our platform's ability to operate across multiple blockchain networks simultaneously.
This means you can use VLT on different blockchains like Ethereum, Solana, and others, choosing the network that best suits your needs in terms of speed, cost, and convenience.
This flexibility allows for broader accessibility and better user experience across the entire crypto ecosystem.
The Vilotra staking program offers multiple tiers with increasing rewards:
1) Connect your wallet (Phaton, Solflare, MetaMask, or other supported wallets)
2) Navigate to the 'Staking' section in your dashboard
3) Choose your staking tier
4) Enter your desired staking amount within your chosen tier
5) Approve the staking transaction in your wallet
Monitor your rewards in real-time and claim them through the staking dashboard. The higher your staking tier, the better your daily rewards!
Vilotra platform stands out for several reasons:
1) True multi-chain integration allowing seamless cross-chain operations
2) Innovative quest and reward system that makes earning crypto engaging and fun
3) High-security standards with regular audits and secure smart contracts
4) Active community governance giving users a voice in platform decisions
5) Sustainable tokenomics designed for long-term growth and stability
We're building more than just a platform - we're creating a comprehensive Web3 ecosystem.
Ready to join ?
